description: Preventive action following the repeated seal failures on Pump P-101 (WO-1041, WO-1052, WO-1067, Incident IR-07). Upgraded to an OEM-recommended cartridge-style mechanical seal with improved tolerance to minor misalignment and cavitation-induced vibration. Sam Reyes signed off on the upgrade as the corrective action closing out the recurring seal failure pattern on P-101.
